title: scutellaria ebracteata
intro: Scutellaria ebracteata, also known as Mexican skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the southwestern United States, Mexico, and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria ebracteata include reducing inflammation and improving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties that may help combat infections. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria ebracteata include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
